# Dootchi: Chat with AI Chars · AI Chat

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dick Davao_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "There is a bug where I click on the watch ad and the ad never pops up. And the result is that I can't continue chatting. Please fix this bug so I can continue playing."

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      6 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Blublubbis Hermoso_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "too many ads:((("
            2. _Hannah Bernabe_, Jul 18, 2026, 2/5: "Ugh there's just so much ads, can u lessen it? Every time i open the app ads pop up and the worse part is that the add were so long."
            3. _H.T Nails Nagelstudio_, Jul 19, 2026, 3/5: "Dootchi is amazing!, I like the fact that you can have a persona so the bots know who you are and the chats are very interesting and immersive as well, one thing I like is how you can also create your own bots. the only issues are that they have had memory and forget stuff in the spawn of a few messages, and there are WAY too many ads, like seriously every phew chats I get an ad. please make it more manageable Dootchi!."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Big Smoke_, Jul 18, 2026, 5/5: "far better than chai chat. and i hope you guys won't do that cheap things what chai chat did. like everything is behind of paywall even talking also behind of paywall. please never do that"
